headline: Is Archer-Daniels-Midland (ADM) Pricing Fair After A 59% One-Year Share Price Jump
summary: If you are looking at Archer-Daniels-Midland and asking whether the current share price really reflects its underlying worth, you are in the right place. The stock last closed at US$72.50, with stated returns of 9.0% over 7 days, 5.7% over 30 days, 22.8% year to date and 58.9% over the past year. This naturally raises questions about how that lines up with its fundamentals. Recent news around Archer-Daniels-Midland has focused on its role as a major player in global agricultural processing...
